name: Sandokan
overview: In this mini-series in six parts from 1976 the Indian actor Kabir Bedi plays the lead role. Carol Andre plays Lady Marianna Guillonk and as Sandokans best friend Yanez de Gomera we see Phillipe Leroy. The noble prince Sandokan is a fighter of the first rank who are cruel to their enemies, but always loyal to his friends.

trailers.title: Sandokan OFFICIAL Trailer | Featuring Kabir Bedi | Carole Andre | Adolfo Celi
